entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: The primary crop studied, including transgenic and non-transgenic cultivars of Gossypium hirsutum and G. arboreum

entities.name: CRY1AC
entities.description: The Bacillus thuringiensis gene used in transgenic cotton to provide resistance to bollworms

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: The soil bacterium from which the cry1Ac gene is derived

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The cotton bollworm, a target insect pest

entities.name: EARIAS VITTELLA
entities.description: The spotted bollworm, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: AMRASCA BIGUTTULA BIGUTTULA
entities.description: The cotton jassid, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: LIRIOMYZA TRIFOLII
entities.description: The serpentine leaf miner, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: BEMISIA TABACI
entities.description: The white fly, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: NEZARA VIRIDULA
entities.description: The green bug, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: MYLLOCERUS UNDECIMPUSTULATUS
entities.description: The ash weevil, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: DYSDERCUS KOENIGII
entities.description: The red cotton bug, a non-target insect pest

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the research farm is located

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific location of the ICRISAT research farm

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The process of laying eggs by insect pests on cotton cultivars

entities.name: LARVAL DENSITY
entities.description: The number of larvae present on the cotton plants

entities.name: BOLLWORM DAMAGE
entities.description: The extent of damage caused by bollworms to cotton squares and bolls

entities.name: SEED COTTON YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed cotton produced per plant or area

entities.name: SHOOT DAMAGE
entities.description: The extent of damage caused by spotted bollworm to cotton shoots

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which cotton cultivars are affected by insect pests

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of cotton cultivars to withstand or repel insect pests

entities.name: PROTECTION REGIMES
entities.description: The different levels of protection (protected vs unprotected) applied to the crops

entities.name: INFESTATION LEVEL
entities.description: The degree of pest infestation (low, moderate, or high)

entities.name: CROPPING SEASON
entities.description: The specific time periods and weather conditions during which observations were made

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of achieving long-term agricultural productivity through combined resistance
